system.armor: 1 (lacks vitals), harmed only by black iron
system.damage: destructive touch 1d10 w/advan- tage (_hand_, _grabby_, ignores armor)
system.moves:
- Manifest in the proper conditions
- Communicate poorly
- Burden with incomprehensible knowledge (page 310)
- Refuse to cooperate
- Manipulate/manifest its element, locally and dramatically

These are spirits (page 358) of funda- mental forces, far removed from mortal concerns. They are active only near sites of primordial power and uncontrolled rifts (page 311), or when called forth by powerful, dangerous magic.
